# Code of Conduct

## The short version

Be a decent human being. This is a hobby Star Citizen companion app.

## Expected behaviour

- Describe bugs clearly and constructively
- Be patient — this is one developer maintaining this in their spare time
- Help other community members where you can (especially in Q&A Discussions)

## Unacceptable behaviour

- Abuse, harassment, or personal attacks
- Deliberately posting others' personal information
- Demanding timelines or treating unpaid open-source work as a commercial obligation

## Scope

This applies to GitHub Issues, Discussions, and any other space connected to this project.

## Enforcement

Violations may result in comments being removed and accounts being blocked from the repository. There is no appeals process.

## Contact

For serious concerns, contact the maintainer via GitHub at [@gavinmcfall](https://github.com/gavinmcfall).
